title: First Life Era
desc: Primitive life forms emerge in an oxygen-rich biosphere. The first Titan-class organisms predate all recorded history. Godzilla-class ancestors roam supercontinent Pangaea.

title: Mass Extinction Event
desc: The K-Pg extinction event drastically reduces surface Titan populations. Many migrate to the Hollow Earth to survive. The subterranean ecosystem develops independently for millions of years.

title: Hollow Earth Civilisation
desc: An advanced primate civilisation flourishes in the Hollow Earth. Kong's ancestors serve as guardians. The Skar King is banished following a war. Iwi tribe connections established.

title: Mothra's First Cycle
desc: The earliest documented Mothra appearance — carved into Yunnan cave paintings and Egyptian hieroglyphics. The Elias fairies emerge as Mothra's human-sized symbiotic companions.

title: Ancient Godzilla Sightings
desc: Godzilla-class Titan documented in Phoenician merchant records and Mesopotamian clay tablets. Referred to as the "God of Destruction who walks the deep."

title: Tokyo Incident — Godzilla Emergence
desc: A massive creature emerges from the Pacific and devastates Tokyo. Dr. Serizawa uses the Oxygen Destroyer to kill it — and himself — in the process. Operation Paperclip veterans form the first Monarch cell.

title: Project Monarch Founded
desc: The United States government officially establishes Monarch Sciences as a classified joint-agency operation. First Director: Lee Shaw. First outpost: Janjira, Japan. Budget: classified.

title: Skull Island Expeditions Begin
desc: First classified Monarch expedition to Skull Island. Kong is documented as a juvenile. Island's ecosystem logged as an anomalous biosphere unlike any on Earth.

title: Skull Island Vietnam Survey
desc: Monarch Survey Group 5 joins the Landsat expedition. Seismic charges trigger Kong. Skullcrawlers documented. Monarch expands Skull Island outpost. Hollow Earth theory gains traction.

title: Janjira Nuclear Plant Incident
desc: A MUTO egg triggers catastrophic seismic events at the Janjira plant, Japan. Official cause listed as nuclear meltdown. Monarch establishes containment zone. Joe Brody begins 15-year investigation.

title: MUTO San Francisco Event
desc: A male and female MUTO emerge on the US West Coast. Godzilla intercepts and destroys both. Estimated casualties: 57,000. San Francisco classified as Titan Impact Zone. Monarch goes public.

title: Skull Island Expedition Returns
desc: Monarch accompanies a full scientific survey. Kong has grown significantly. Skullcrawler population controlled. Hollow Earth entrance located beneath the island. Iwi population documented.

title: King of the Monsters Event
desc: Eco-terrorist Emma Russell activates the Orca, awakening dormant Titans globally. Ghidorah's psychic alpha overrides Earth's hierarchy. Godzilla undergoes nuclear supercharge. Ghidorah decapitated.

title: Godzilla vs. Kong — Hollow Earth Discovered
desc: Monarch guides Kong through the Hollow Earth to locate an ancient power source. Godzilla attacks Apex Cybernetics. Mechagodzilla activated and taken over by Ghidorah's residual consciousness. Destroyed.

title: Monarch: Legacy — Present Day Events
desc: Cate and Kentaro Randa discover their father's Monarch connections. Ancient Titan chambers discovered in Alaska. The Ion Dragon emerges. Hollow Earth breach confirmed in Kazakhstan.

title: New Empire — Skar King Incursion
desc: Kong discovers the Skar Tribe and Shimo in the Hollow Earth. Skar King mounts a surface invasion via the Arctic. Godzilla absorbs nuclear energy from global sources. Combined assault defeats Skar King.

title: Godzilla's Pink Evolution
desc: During the New Empire conflict, Godzilla absorbed radiation from multiple global nuclear sources, triggering a previously undocumented evolutionary form. Dorsal plates turn pink. Power output increased 340%.

title: Post-New Empire Assessment
desc: Monarch assesses global Titan activity following Skar King defeat. Shimo confirmed benevolent under freedom. Kong establishes Hollow Earth kingdom. Godzilla returns to dormancy cycle.

title: Current Monitoring Status
desc: MonarchIntel operational. 48 Titans catalogued. 12 active monitoring outposts globally. Hollow Earth survey ongoing. New Titan signatures detected in South China Sea — classification pending.

title: Apex Cybernetics — Ghidorah DNA Archive
desc: Evidence suggests Apex recovered more than Ghidorah's skull. Monarch Section 9 investigating reports of stored Ghidorah cell cultures at three offshore facilities. Status: UNCONFIRMED.

title: Projected: Titan Ecological Apex
desc: Monarch's centennial projections model a future Earth where Titan populations have fully stabilised with human civilisation — a co-existence epoch. Classification: THEORETICAL.
